sub_pixel_system.notes: RTS game - sub-pixel precision not typically documented for this genre

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: RTS game with faction-specific unit movement characteristics. Soviet units noted as slower but heavier firepower; Allied units faster and more maneuverable

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics
special_mechanics.description: Different unit classes have distinct movement profiles based on faction and role (tanks, infantry, etc.)

physics_values.gi_infantry: slower to train, superior to Soviet conscripts (Allied)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - RTS game without detailed physics documentation. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mechanics and unit balance descriptions, no granular movement or physics parameters. Player character movement not applicable as this is an RTS with controllable units rather than a single player character.
